summary: Tested SIGESC global messaging system. All 14 backend tests passed. Fixed MessagesBadge to open ChatBox directly without navigation. Frontend verified: Messages icon visible on all pages, ChatBox opens globally from dropdown, admin can send direct messages.
critical_code_review_comments: App.js: MessagingProvider correctly wraps entire app (line 72)
Layout.js: ChatBox rendered globally when activeChat is set (lines 165-170)
MessagesBadge.js: FIXED - Now uses openChat() instead of navigate() for conversations
UserProfile.js: Uses openChat from context for admin_direct messaging (line 94, 700-720)
social.py: POST /api/connections/direct/{user_id} creates direct connection for admin
social.py: GET /api/connections/status/{user_id} returns admin_direct when admin involved
seed_data_creation: None - used existing users in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Global messaging system fully tested. MessagesBadge was fixed to use openChat() from MessagingContext instead of navigating to /profile. ChatBox now opens on any page when clicking a conversation in the dropdown. Admin direct messaging works - admin can message any user without prior connection.

messages_icon_header.test: Messages icon (MessagesBadge) appears in header on all pages
messages_icon_header.details: Verified on Dashboard, Schools, Profile pages

chatbox_opens_without_navigation.test: Clicking conversation in dropdown opens ChatBox without navigating to /profile
chatbox_opens_without_navigation.details: Fixed MessagesBadge to use openChat() - URL stays on current page

chatbox_global_layout.test: ChatBox is rendered in Layout component globally
chatbox_global_layout.details: Layout.js lines 165-170 render ChatBox when activeChat is set

direct_connection_admin.test: POST /api/connections/direct/{user_id} creates connection when admin involved
direct_connection_admin.details: Admin can create direct connection with any user

direct_connection_403.test: POST /api/connections/direct/{user_id} returns 403 when no admin involved
direct_connection_403.details: Non-admin to non-admin direct connection blocked

connection_status_admin_direct.test: GET /api/connections/status/{user_id} returns admin_direct when admin views non-connected user

send_message_auto_connection.test: POST /api/messages auto-creates connection when admin involved
send_message_auto_connection.details: Admin can send message without prior connection

mensagem_button_profile.test: Mensagem button appears on profile when status is admin_direct or accepted
mensagem_button_profile.details: Button visible on other user's profile, opens ChatBox on click

messaging_context_provided.details: MessagingProvider wraps entire app at line 72

userprofile_uses_context.test: UserProfile uses openChat from global context

fix_applied.issue: Clicking conversation navigated to /profile instead of opening ChatBox directly
fix_applied.fix: Changed onClick handler to use openChat() from MessagingContext instead of navigate()
